# AutoRig V2 AI Instructions

Before making changes:

- Read README.md
- Read ARCHITECTURE.md
- Read CODING_STANDARD.md
- Read AI_CONTEXT.md
- Read PROJECT_STATE.md

Rules:

- Do not modify Builder unless required.
- Keep Blender API inside Services.
- Prefer Data-Driven Design.
- Add type hints and docstrings.
- Do not introduce duplicate logic.
